title: paeonia × suffruticosa var. banksii
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa var. banksii, also known as Peony Banks' or Tree Peony, is a variety of peony that is known for its tree-like habit and stunning flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties that can aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Paeonia × suffruticosa var. banksii include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the roots and flowers of the plant are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
